statements.sql: select count(*) as aggregate from `cms` where `seo_url` = 'terms-and-condition' and `id` <> '25'

update `cms` set `shortDescription` = '

 

Welcome to VoteYour a place to speak up, share your thoughts, and explore what others think, all without revealing your identity. These Terms and Conditions explain your rights and responsibilities when using our platform.

Use of VoteYour constitutes your acknowledgment and acceptance of our terms of service.

Your use of Vote Your

VoteYour is built for open, respectful expression. You can:

  • Participate in or create polls on topics that matter to you.
  • Vote anonymously and view results in real time.
  • Share ideas without revealing personal information.

You may not:

  • Post an offensive or discriminatory comment.
  • Interfere with the site’s functionality or other users’ experience.
  • Attempt to exploit, reverse engineer, or misuse the platform.

We reserve the right to remove content or block accounts that violate these principles.

Account Access

You can browse polls without signing up. If you choose to register, we ask only for your email address to help you log in securely.

Keep your login credentials private. You are responsible for any activity done under your account.

Content ownership and responsibility

You own the content you create (polls, comments, etc.), but you give VoteYour the right to display and store that content on our platform.

You are responsible for what you post. Don’t upload anything you don’t have the right to, and don’t impersonate others.

Privacy and Data Use

We care about privacy. Seriously.

  • We collect minimal data—mainly your email (if you sign up), voting activity (stored anonymously), and basic technical information.
  • We don’t sell your data, track your identity, or use third-party ads.
  • Read our Privacy Policy for the full breakdown.

Cookies and Technology

We use cookies only for functionality, such as keeping you logged in and remembering your preferences. We don’t use them for advertising or creepy tracking.

You can manage cookies through your browser at any time.

Availability of Platform

We do our best to keep VoteYour running 24/7, but we can’t guarantee there will be no interruptions or bugs. If maintenance or outages occur, we will aim to notify users as soon as possible.

Changes to the Platform or Terms

We may update these Terms occasionally. Major changes will be announced on the website or via email. Continuing to use the site means you accept any updated terms.

Termination

We can suspend or deactivate your account if you break these terms, especially if your behavior harms the community or the integrity of the platform.

You can delete your account anytime from your settings or by contacting us. When you do, we erase your personal data from our system.

Liability Disclaimer

VoteYour provides this service “as is.” We are  not responsible for:

  • The accuracy or legality of user-generated content
  • Any consequences of the poll results or discussions
  • Downtime, data loss, or technical glitches

Use the platform responsibly and at your own discretion.

Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the applicable laws of the jurisdiction in which the agreement is executed. Any legal disputes arising will be resolved in the courts of that jurisdiction.

Have questions?

We’re here to help. For questions or concerns about these terms, reach out to us!

', `cms`.`updated_at` = '2025-06-12 12:50:54' where `id` = 25
